name: Aura Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Experience pure sound with industry-leading active noise cancellation. Features 30-hour battery life, touch controls, and ultra-comfortable ear cushions for all-day listening.

name: Chronos Smartwatch Pro
description: Stay connected and track your fitness with the Chronos Pro. Features a stunning OLED display, heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, and a premium metal band.

name: Apex Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: Dominate your games with tactile switches and customizable RGB backlighting. Features an ergonomic wrist rest, programmable macro keys, and an aircraft-grade aluminum frame.

name: SkyHawk 4K Camera Drone
description: Capture stunning 4K aerial footage with the SkyHawk Drone. Includes GPS tracking, 3-axis gimbal, auto-return home feature, and 40 minutes of flight time.

name: X-Pro Smartphone 256GB
description: The ultimate smartphone experience. Featuring a 6.7-inch OLED display, triple camera setup, next-gen AI processor, and all-day battery life.

name: Zenith Ultra-Thin Tablet
description: Work and play on the go. The Zenith Tablet offers a vibrant 11-inch display, quad speakers, and supports stylus input for creative professionals.

name: EliteBook Pro 15-inch Laptop
description: A powerhouse for creators. Equipped with a 12-core processor, 32GB RAM, 1TB SSD, and a dedicated GPU for rendering and gaming.

name: ErgoGrip Wireless Mouse
description: Designed for comfort and precision. The ErgoGrip reduces wrist strain during long hours of work. Features silent clicks and adjustable DPI.

name: Echo Home Smart Speaker
description: Control your smart home and listen to high-fidelity audio with voice commands. Fits seamlessly into any room decor.

name: Visionary VR Headset
description: Step into new worlds. Our standalone VR headset offers 4K resolution per eye, immersive 3D audio, and zero wires for absolute freedom.

name: Premium Organic Raw Honey
description: Pure, unpasteurized, and ethically sourced organic honey. Perfect for sweetening tea, baking, or enjoying straight from the jar.

name: Artisanal Dark Roast Coffee Beans
description: A bold and rich blend of ethically sourced Arabica beans. Roasted to perfection to deliver notes of dark chocolate and roasted caramel.

name: Gourmet Roasted Mixed Nuts
description: A delicious and healthy mix of premium almonds, cashews, walnuts, and pistachios. Lightly roasted and seasoned with sea salt.

name: Artisan Sourdough Loaf
description: Freshly baked sourdough bread with a crispy crust and a soft, airy interior. Naturally fermented for a perfect tangy flavor.

name: Farm Fresh Strawberries (1kg)
description: Locally grown, hand-picked strawberries bursting with sweet and juicy flavor. Delivered fresh from the farm to your door.

name: Handcrafted Dark Chocolate Truffles
description: A box of luxurious handmade chocolate truffles. Made with 70% single-origin dark chocolate and a creamy ganache center.

name: Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil
description: Cold-pressed organic olive oil imported from Italy. Offers a robust, peppery flavor profile ideal for dressings and cooking.

name: Authentic Fire-Roasted Salsa
description: A bold and spicy salsa made from fire-roasted tomatoes, jalapeños, onions, and fresh cilantro. Perfect for tacos and chips.

name: Ceremonial Grade Matcha Tea
description: Premium organic matcha powder sourced directly from Kyoto, Japan. Delivers a smooth, rich umami flavor and a natural energy boost.

name: Handmade Italian Fusilli Pasta
description: Traditional bronze-die extruded fusilli pasta. Made from 100% durum wheat semolina for perfect al dente texture every time.

name: Classic Vintage Denim Jacket
description: A timeless wardrobe staple. This classic denim jacket features a relaxed fit, durable metal buttons, and multiple pockets. Perfect for layering.

name: Velocity Running Shoes
description: Lightweight, breathable, and designed for maximum speed and comfort. Features a responsive foam midsole and a durable rubber outsole.

name: Essential White Cotton T-Shirt
description: The perfect everyday t-shirt. Made from 100% organic cotton for a soft, breathable feel. Features a tailored fit.

name: Cozy Knit Winter Beanie
description: Keep warm in style with this soft knit beanie. Made from a premium wool blend, it offers a snug fit and excellent insulation.

name: Artisan Leather Crossbody Bag
description: Handcrafted from genuine full-grain leather. This elegant crossbody bag features brass hardware and enough space for daily essentials.

name: Men's Casual Button-Down Shirt
description: A versatile long-sleeve shirt perfect for casual Fridays or weekend outings. Made from lightweight, breathable linen blend.

name: Women's Floral Summer Dress
description: A breezy, flowy sundress with a vibrant floral pattern. Features adjustable straps and a flattering A-line silhouette.

name: High-Waisted Mom Jeans
description: Retro-inspired mom jeans featuring a flattering high waist, relaxed fit through the leg, and a slightly tapered ankle.

name: Classic Aviator Sunglasses
description: Timeless aviator shades featuring polarized lenses for UV protection and a lightweight, durable metal frame.

name: Comfort Cotton Socks (3-Pack)
description: A pack of three incredibly soft, moisture-wicking crew socks. Designed with reinforced heels and toes for long-lasting durability.
